sys_relationship.name: Portal Dashboards

sys_update_version.name: sys_relationship_36c94fa7a8124ff68d5ac9dc2e5ec982
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_relationship">
  <sys_relationship action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>36c94fa7a8124ff68d5ac9dc2e5ec982</sys_id>
    <sys_scope display_value="x_1295779_metpo">63deb6d19334031051d7b1dcebba103c</sys_scope>
    <sys_update_name>sys_relationship_36c94fa7a8124ff68d5ac9dc2e5ec982</sys_update_name>
    <advanced>true</advanced>
    <basic_apply_to>x_1295779_metpo_metrics_portal</basic_apply_to>
    <basic_query_from>x_1295779_metpo_dashboard</basic_query_from>
    <insert_callback>(function insertCallback(target, current) {
    var m2m = new GlideRecord('x_1295779_metpo_m2m_portal_dashboard');
    m2m.initialize();
    m2m.setValue('metrics_portal', current.sys_id);
    m2m.setValue('metric_dashboard', target.sys_id);
    m2m.insert();
})(target, current)</insert_callback>
    <name>Portal Dashboards</name>
    <query_with>(function refineQuery(current) {
    var m2m = new GlideRecord('x_1295779_metpo_m2m_portal_dashboard');
    m2m.addQuery('metrics_portal', current.sys_id);
    m2m.query();
    var ids = [];
    while (m2m.next()) {
        ids.push(m2m.getValue('metric_dashboard'));
    }
    if (ids.length > 0) {
        return 'sys_idIN' + ids.join(',');
    }
    return 'sys_id=-1';
})(current)</query_with>
  </sys_relationship>
</record_update>
